case_title: DEBORAH MOSS VS. MARINERS VILLAGE CONDOMINIUM OWNERS ASS.

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MOSS, DEBORAH
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSS, DEBORAH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARINERS  VILLAGE CONDOMINIUM OWNERS ASS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY MOSS, DEBORAH AS TO DEFENDANT MARINERS  VILLAGE CONDOMINIUM OWNERS ASS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2015 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MARINERS  VILLAGE CONDOMINIUM OWNERS ASS.
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,900.00 FILED BY MOSS, DEBORAH AS TO DEFENDANT MARINERS  VILLAGE CONDOMINIUM OWNERS ASS.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2015 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSS, DEBORAH AS TO DEFENDANT MARINERS  VILLAGE CONDOMINIUM OWNERS ASS.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-14-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JERALD JOSEPH--PROPERTY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - ON AMENDED CLAIM SERVED NOV-05-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARINERS  VILLAGE CONDOMINIUM OWNERS ASS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSS, DEBORAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARINERS  VILLAGE CONDOMINIUM OWNERS ASS. $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,105.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN JANUARY 29, 2016 PROVIDE TO THE PLAINTIFF THE CIVIL CODE SECTION 1365.2 RECORDS REQUESTED BY THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
